title: Robert Jones
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Jones}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Robert Jones''' is a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] inker. He worked on the
''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series on the [[Star Wars: Republic: Prelude to Rebellion|''Prelude to Rebellion'']], and [[Star Wars: Republic: Emissaries to Malastare|''Emissaries to Malastare'']] storylines.
